# @stll/fuzzy-search

NAPI-RS bindings for fuzzy string matching via Myers'
bit-parallel algorithm. Exposes multi-pattern fuzzy
search and a standalone edit-distance helper for
Node.js and Bun.

## Package status

Public npm publishing is not enabled yet. The planned
package name is `@stll/fuzzy-search`.

## API

```typescript
import { FuzzySearch, distance } from "@stll/fuzzy-search";

const search = new FuzzySearch(
  [{ pattern: "hello", distance: 1 }],
  { wholeWords: false },
);

search.isMatch("helo world"); // true
distance("kitten", "sitting"); // 3
```
